Make sure to follow the formatting: "route_verdict=CONTINUE", "repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning", "blocked_move=do not invent source IDs". Provide exactly those three lines.

Thus answer.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
